# misp_tag (Resource)

A MISP tag. Tags classify events and attributes and drive taxonomy-based sharing.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_tag" "tlp_amber" {
  name       = "tlp:amber"
  colour     = "#FFC000"
  exportable = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Tag name (e.g. `tlp:amber`). Must be unique within the instance.

### Optional

- `colour` (String) Hex colour used in the MISP UI (e.g. `#FFC000`).
- `exportable` (Boolean) Whether the tag is included when events are exported. Defaults to true.
- `hide_tag` (Boolean) Hide the tag from the UI tag picker.
- `local_only` (Boolean) When true, the tag is not synced to other instances.
- `numerical_value` (Number) Optional numeric weight used by analytical workflows.
- `org_id` (String) Restrict tag use to an organisation (id). Empty means all organisations.
- `user_id` (String) Restrict tag use to a specific user id. Empty means all users.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP tag by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_tag.tlp_amber 17
```
